title: Update LOBODA Jewelry logo to have a transparent background

requirements.summary: Replace existing logo assets with transparent-background versions while maintaining the same filenames and ensuring proper display against dark backgrounds
acceptanceCriteria: loboda-logo.png renders with a fully transparent background (no white, black, or colored fill behind the swan emblem and text).
loboda-logo-icon.png renders with a fully transparent background.
Both logos display correctly against the site's dark charcoal/black header and footer backgrounds without any visible background box or halo.
No layout or sizing regressions in Header or Footer components.

file_operations.description: Generate the main LOBODA logo with transparent background, preserving the gold swan emblem and 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text exactly as in the original design. This file will replace the existing loboda-logo.png asset and be referenced by Header and Footer components using the same filename pattern.

Generate the icon variant of the LOBODA logo with transparent background, preserving the gold swan icon and 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text exactly as in the original design. This file will replace the existing loboda-logo-icon.png asset and ensure proper display in the Header component and favicon contexts.
